recommendations.title: Cold War
recommendations.overview: Five police officers in Hong Kong are kidnapped. The police commissioner is on a business trip overseas. Two vice commissioners, Sean Rau and M.B. Lee, then take over the case. The two vice commissioners are rivals who both vie for the police commiss

recommendations.title: Left-Handed Girl
recommendations.overview: A mother and her two daughters move to Taipei to open a noodle stand at a vibrant night market, but family secrets and tradition test their fresh start.

recommendations.title: You Are the Apple of My Eye
recommendations.overview: A group of close friends who attend a private school all have a debilitating crush on the sunny star pupil, Shen Chia-yi. The only member of the group who claims not to is Ko Ching-teng, but he ends up loving her as well.

recommendations.title: Firestorm
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong. When Cao Nan and his group of thieves rob an armored car in broad daylight, they don't hesitate to murder innocent people on the run. Lui Ming Chit, a veteran police inspector, is forced to use sinister tactics to catch them.

recommendations.title: Project Gutenberg
recommendations.overview: The Hong Kong police is hunting a counterfeiting gang led by a mastermind code-named "Painter" . The gang possesses exceptional counterfeiting skills which makes it difficult to distinguish the authenticity of its counterfeit currency. The scope of t

recommendations.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
recommendations.overview: In 1980s Hong Kong, troubled youth Chan Lok-kwun, a mainland refugee, struggles to survive in the Kowloon Walled City by joining underground fights. Betrayed by crime boss Mr. Big while trying to buy a fake ID, he steals drugs from him and seeks refu

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs II
recommendations.overview: In this prequel to the original, a bloody power struggle among the Triads coincides with the 1997 handover of Hong Kong, setting up the events of the first film.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: PTU
recommendations.overview: Follows a police tactical unit during one dangerous night on the streets of Hong Kong as they try to recover a cop's stolen gun. Things turn deadly when they run into a web of gangland crimes.

recommendations.title: Police Story 2
recommendations.overview: The Hong Kong super-cop must stop a group of blackmailing bombers at the same time that the villains of the first Police Story are out for revenge.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.
